frequency_source: wordfreq Zipf (English; mixture includes OpenSubtitles, Wikipedia, etc.)
frequency_source_deviation_note: Proposal v2 specified SUBTLEX-US; canonical SUBTLEX-US download URLs returned 404 at implementation time. wordfreq is the implementation backend, with OpenSubtitles in its English source mixture preserving the proposal's subtitle-domain match argument in spirit. Surfaced for planning-conversation review.
